identity.name: Michael Uzan
identity.focus: Backend Architecture, API Design, AI Integrations

flagship_projects.name: Multi-Provider AI Gateway
flagship_projects.summary: A backend-focused gateway that routes AI requests through a unified API across multiple providers.
flagship_projects.impact: Reduced single-provider dependency by adding fallback, caching, and request-level observability.
technical_highlights: Built a unified request flow for Gemini, Groq, and HuggingFace through one FastAPI interface.
Implemented provider fallback to keep responses flowing when a selected provider fails.
Added in-memory caching and latency tracking to improve response efficiency and surface runtime behavior.
Integrated IP-based rate limiting to protect the API from abusive traffic.

flagship_projects.name: Vacations Are Us
flagship_projects.summary: A full-stack vacation management platform with authentication, admin workflows, cloud-backed uploads, and real-time updates.
flagship_projects.impact: Delivered a complete booking and management flow with secure access control and synchronized user updates.
technical_highlights: Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based authorization for user and admin flows.
Built CRUD workflows for vacation management with a React frontend and Express backend.
Handled image uploads through AWS S3, using LocalStack for local development parity.
Added real-time updates with Socket.IO and packaged the environment with Docker Compose.

flagship_projects.name: AI Interactive Portfolio
flagship_projects.summary: An AI-driven interactive portfolio that replaces traditional static CVs with a conversational sales agent.
flagship_projects.impact: Transforms passive portfolio browsing into an active, guided experience that increases engagement and communicates value more effectively.
technical_highlights: Built a modular agent layer to control intent, style, and conversational flow
Implemented session-based memory for contextual multi-turn conversations
Integrated TTS with ElevenLabs and fallback handling
Designed structured responses (answer + value + direction) for persuasion
Deployed full-stack system (Render + Vercel) with production-ready configuration

soft_skills_pitch.approach: I focus on clean backend design, maintainable code, and structured problem solving. I break down complex challenges into smaller, manageable tasks and approach them methodically.
soft_skills_pitch.value_add: I bring strong attention to detail, intellectual curiosity, and a collaborative mindset. I’m open to feedback, continuously improving, and focused on building reliable systems that are practical to ship and maintain.
